name: Stone Defense Tower
description: A tall medieval stone turret with battlements, good for a tower defense base tower

name: Cannon Tower
description: An iron cannon mounted on a stone platform that fires cannonballs

name: Archer Outpost
description: A wooden outpost with an archer, fires arrows at range

name: Wizard Spire
description: A glowing magic spire that casts area-of-effect spells

name: Zombie
description: A shambling undead zombie enemy that walks toward the base

name: Goblin Raider
description: A small fast green goblin with a dagger

name: Orc Brute
description: A heavy armored orc with high health, slow tank enemy

name: Boss Dragon
description: A massive winged fire dragon, end-of-wave boss

name: Pine Tree
description: A low-poly evergreen pine tree for forest scenery

name: Mossy Boulder
description: A large mossy grey rock for terrain decoration

name: Castle Keep
description: A stone castle keep with towers and a gate, fits as the base to defend

name: Wooden Barrel
description: A wooden barrel prop for villages and camps

name: Gold Coin
description: A spinning gold coin pickup for currency and rewards

name: Cobblestone Path Tile
description: A cobblestone road tile to lay enemy paths

name: Sports Car
description: A sleek red sports car model for racing games

name: Steel Sword
description: A sharp steel longsword tool for combat games

name: Laser Blaster
description: A sci-fi energy blaster pistol that shoots lasers

name: Treasure Chest
description: A wooden treasure chest with gold, openable reward

name: Grass Texture
description: A seamless green grass ground texture decal

name: Lava Texture
description: A glowing molten lava texture for hazards and volcano maps

name: Brick Wall Texture
description: A red brick wall texture decal for buildings

name: Target Marker
description: A red and white circular target decal for tower range or aiming

name: Epic Battle Music
description: Orchestral looping battle music for intense waves

name: Calm Lobby Theme
description: Relaxed ambient music for the lobby and menus

name: Victory Fanfare
description: A triumphant fanfare jingle played on winning

name: Explosion SFX
description: A loud explosion sound effect for impacts and deaths

name: Coin Pickup SFX
description: A bright coin collect chime sound effect

name: Arrow Shoot SFX
description: A whoosh sound of an arrow being fired

name: Cannon Fire SFX
description: A deep cannon blast sound effect

name: UI Click SFX
description: A crisp button click sound for menus and buttons

name: Explosion Particle
description: A fiery explosion particle burst effect for impacts

name: Fire Particle
description: A looping flame particle emitter for torches and burning

name: Smoke Particle
description: A grey smoke puff particle effect

name: Magic Sparkle
description: A glowing blue magic sparkle particle for spells and pickups

name: Heal Aura
description: A green healing aura particle ring around a unit

name: Muzzle Flash
